title: Enel spends a billion bucks on US wind and solar projects
description: Multinational power company Enel has agreed to spend $1 billion to expand its U.S. wind and solar portfolio and is investing $31 billion through 2028 on power grids.
content: Multinational power company Enel has agreed to spend $1 billion to expand its U.S. wind and solar portfolio and is investing $31 billion through 2028 on power grids.
